_comment_coords: Button coords [fx,fy] and regions [fx,fy,fw,fh] are FRACTIONS (0..1) of the Roblox window client area. Re-calibrate with: python tools/calibrate.py

navigation._comment_vendor_soft: When true (default), vendor mode only runs when Roblox is already focused — won't pull focus from your browser.
navigation._comment_vendor: vendor_mode: stand at shop NPC — watch restock banner, E to open, scan, X to close. Skips Buy button and Country return. vendor_poll_sec: optional extra timer poll (null = banner only).

game._comment: Game UI language. auto = all supported languages (recommended). Or set en/fr/de/es/pt to match Roblox.

ocr._comment: OCR model: auto follows game.locale (latin for most languages, en for English). Override with en/latin if needed.

buy._comment: Auto-buy with the green in-shop money button. dry_run=true only logs what it WOULD buy (safe for testing). max_per_item=0 -> buy the whole stock. Edit items[] to choose what to buy.
buy._comment_budget: max_total_per_restock caps how many units (across ALL categories) can be bought in one restock cycle. 0 = unlimited. Combine with priority/category_priority so the cap is spent on what you want most.
buy._comment_priority: Optional. Overrides items[]'s order as the buy priority within a category (first = bought first when budget/stock is limited). Omit a category to just use its items[] order.
buy._comment_category_priority: Optional. Order categories are attempted in (e.g. spend the shared budget on Military before Factory). Omit to use navigation.categories order.
buy._comment_verify: verify_purchases: after each click, re-reads the item's stock number and only counts the click as 'confirmed' if it actually dropped — catches clicks that silently did nothing. Costs one extra OCR per click, so it's off by default.
buy._comment_disabled_button: Optional. HSV range for the button's DISABLED/greyed-out look (shown when you can't afford an item), separate from button_hsv_low/high (the normal green). Lets the bot report 'insufficient funds' instead of guessing 'sold out'. Leave null until you calibrate it against a real screenshot of an unaffordable item — an unconfirmed guess here will misreport, which is worse than the default sold-out fallback.

report._comment: items: a per-category whitelist the reader uses for an early-stop while scrolling (find these highest-value items faster).

logs._comment: cleanup_on_stop wipes logs/ and screenshots when you stop the bot. Toggle off in Settings → Advanced when debugging.

update._comment: Host update.json (see update.json.example) on GitHub raw or your server. Clients check on launch.

events._comment: Full game-screen screenshot on each restock -> events folder. keep = how many newest to retain.

timed_screenshots._comment: Screenshot the game screen every period_sec (and again extra_offset_sec later), from launch -> dir folder.
